texto: Who is a rebellious person? The rebellious person is one who does not bother about the society at all. He simply lives through his innermost core
autor: he is one who follows his Tao.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de he is one who follows his Tao. que provoca sentido da existência e experiência vivida. Ao questionar “Who is a rebellious person? The rebellious person is one who does not bother about the society at…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre vida, osho, tao-the-pathless-path, com foco em tao-the-pathless-path.
